hero.headline: Cameras Watch. Nobody Alerts.
hero.subheadline: Turn your existing CCTV into an AI fire early-warning system. Zero hardware costs. Detection in under 3 seconds.

valueProps.title: Built for Pakistan's Fire Safety Crisis

hardware.title: Zero Hardware Cost
hardware.description: Works with your existing CCTV cameras. No sensors, no installation, no rewiring. Just connect and protect.

speed.title: < 3 Second Detection
speed.description: Our proprietary AI engine detects fire and smoke in under 3 seconds — before traditional alarms even trigger.

accuracy.title: 99.52% Accuracy
accuracy.description: Multi-layer AI verification eliminates false positives. Near-zero false alarms means real alerts, not noise.

howItWorks.title: From Camera to Alert in Seconds

connect.title: Connect CCTV
connect.description: Link your existing cameras via RTSP stream

nvr.title: Plug Into NVR
nvr.description: Nigahban connects to your existing NVR/DVR

detect.title: AI Detects Threat
detect.description: Proprietary AI engine analyzes every frame in real-time

alert.title: Instant Alert
alert.description: WhatsApp, Email, Telegram alerts sent in seconds

deaths.label: Deaths in Gul Plaza fire, Jan 2026

factories.title: Factories
factories.description: Textile mills, chemical plants, and manufacturing units — where fires cause the most damage.

malls.title: Shopping Malls
malls.description: High foot traffic, food courts, and multi-tenant spaces requiring 24/7 fire monitoring.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.description: High-value inventory at risk overnight. One fire can destroy millions in goods.

plazas.title: Commercial Plazas
plazas.description: Multi-story, multi-tenant buildings with shared fire risk and slow evacuation.

cta.title: Protect Your Building Today
cta.description: Join the first AI fire detection network in Pakistan. Free pilot for qualified buildings.

footer.tagline: Protecting Pakistan through intelligent fire detection.
